name: Safe Project Map and Context Budget
objective: Create a bounded evidence-linked structural map for a large repository without a repository-wide read, persistent index, or unsupported token-saving claim.
non_goals: No index, graph database, broad scan, sync, model call, secret discovery, or automatic context injection.
inputs: Future customer-approved exact paths and an explicit context budget.
outputs: Future reviewable map manifest, evidence links, exclusions, and budget report.
excluded_patterns: PAT-021 requires a broader context-pack design mapping and is not a full coverage claim.
known_gaps: The proposal is locked and has not been runtime-validated; no repository map is produced by this contract.
